no: Install after all NPC mods. Not compatible with Spell50. Use at most one of SR, MiH Spell Pack, or IWDification for spell overhaul.

spells: Gains small area of effect; improved scaling
1d8 cold damage + 1 STR drain; improved scaling
Random effects scale better with caster level
Targets fall unconscious 1 round; reduced AoE
Rebalanced drain amounts and temp HP
Improved to provide better decoy mechanics
Improved AC values and Magic Missile immunity
Improved fear mechanics and save penalty
Improved paralysis and added nausea effect
Improved fear radius and save penalties
Rebalanced image count and dispel mechanics
Adjusted HP threshold and sleep duration
Improved nausea mechanics and save type
Improved web mechanics and save frequency
Improved arrow count and damage scaling
Rebalanced: +1 APR, no AC bonus, no aging
Improved hold duration and save mechanics
Improved slow effects and save mechanics
Improved drain scaling and temp HP
Combined Fire Shield: improved fire damage
Disabled (Monster Summoning II moved to level 2)
Renamed Simbul's Spell Matrix; improved storage
Improved lightning arc damage and scaling
Improved save and damage on save
Rebalanced: doubles APR, no AC bonus
Improved stun duration and HP threshold
Renamed Bigby's Icy Grasp; cold damage + slow
Disabled (Protection from Fire moved to level 5)
Disabled (Protection from Lightning moved to level 5)
Disabled (Cure Critical Wounds moved to level 4)
Disabled (Cause Critical Wounds moved to level 4)
Disabled (Dimension Door replaced by Dimension Jump at level 1)
new: Touch attack serious damage (moved from lv4)

spells: Spell Deflection now blocks AoE spells targeting the caster

conflicts.reason: Spell Revisions and Divine Remix are incompatible
Component 15 (Thrown Spiritual Hammers) is incompatible with SR — SR completely redesigns Spiritual Hammer and the thrown patch causes damage to glitch to 0. Components 0, 25, 35, 50 are unaffected.
conflicts.source: Mod ic field, SHS forum thread, tp2 analysis. Only comp 15 conflicts; other 4 components (0, 25, 35, 50) work fine with SR. 2026-03

conflicts.reason: MiH Spell Pack modifies spells also changed by SR. Install MiH SP after SR; overlapping changes use MiH SP's versions.
conflicts.theirComps: #1 Arcane Spellpack #2 Divine Spellpack #13 Spell Improvements #16 Spell Improvements

conflicts.reason: 7 specific Olvyn components FORBID SR cn:0 — they auto-skip if SR is installed. These are all spell-modification components that overlap with SR's rewrites. Olvyn cn:980/990 (Ranger/Paladin progression, the only Olvyn components ) have NO SR FORBID and coexist safely — they only modify class progression 2DAs, not spell files.
conflicts.theirComps: #11051 BG1 Entangle #14021 BG1 Monster/Animal Summoning #15071 Champion's Strength STR 25 #17261 Weaken Devas #21111 Infravision→True Strike #23011 Indoor Clairvoyance #25011 Restore Animate Dead (all FORBID SR, all absent from Ultimate preset)
conflicts.source: MESpells.tp2 lines 2405/2637/2664/2755/2784/2850/3659: FORBID_COMPONENT setup-spell_rev.tp2 0; cn:980/990 have no SR check, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: SCS has built-in SR detection via FORBID_COMPONENT on 3 specific components (cn:2520 Revised Elementals, cn:4130 Resurrection, cn:4240 HLAs as innate) — these auto-block if SR present. All other SCS spell/IWD components detect SR and adjust behavior accordingly (different spell resources used). SCS is explicitly designed for SR compatibility. Install SR before SCS.
conflicts.theirComps: #2520 Revised elementals #4130 Resurrection #4240 HLAs as innate (FORBID with SR); #1500 #1510 #2000-#2080 #2500 #2510 (SR-aware)
conflicts.source: SCS tp2 lines 381/719/944: FORBID_COMPONENT spell_rev; SR readme confirms SCS compat, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: KLATU spell tweaks overlap with Spell Revisions. The three Non-Magical ability components (#2120) are redundant if SR is installed
conflicts.theirComps: #2040 Wild Mage #2050 Wish spells #2070 Free Action/Haste #2120 Non-Magical abilities

conflicts.reason: aTweaks auto-blocks components 102, 103, 204, 205, 211 when SR detected (content duplication prevention). Components 104, 105, 150-156 have built-in SR compatibility code and install fine. Install SR before aTweaks.
conflicts.theirComps: #102 Spiritual Hammer, #103 Dispel vs Globes, #204 Mislead, #205 Project Image, #211 Death Ward (auto-blocked by aTweaks installer when SR present)
conflicts.source: aTweaks tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED spell_rev.tp2 0; c150.tpa/c190.tpa SR compat code; Bart_Tweaks crossmod patches, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: SR #0 modifies spell-created weapons (overlaps cdtweaks #2220 Zero Weight) and magical traps (overlaps #2330 Remove Trap Delay). SR #70 Revised Saving Throws overlaps cdtweaks #2310-2312 Save Penalties. Install SR before cdtweaks.
Spell Revisions conflict with Wild Mage Additions misc spell tweaks
D0 Tweak components #0 (BG1-Style Summoning Spells) and #23 overlap with SR's revised summoning. PnP Celestial Fury (#7) does not conflict. Only relevant if summoning components are installed.
conflicts.source: tp2 analysis — d0tweak #7 (PnP Celestial Fury) is unrelated to SR spell changes, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Complementary — SubtleD REQUIRES SR v4. Components use REQUIRE_PREDICATE FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME dvsrv4here.mrk (SR v4 marker file). These components apply additional tweaks ON TOP of SR-modified spells. Will not install without SR. Safe to use together — designed as SR companion mod.
conflicts.source: SubtleD tp2 lines 294/438/574+: REQUIRE_PREDICATE FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME dvsrv4here.mrk, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: Redundant. SR cn:0 rewrites all spell files wholesale. TB cn:100 patches sppr704.spl (Nature's Beauty), cn:150 patches imprisonment spells, cn:200 patches ALL .spl files for petrification. TB does NOT detect SR. If both installed, SR's versions dominate regardless of order (SR uses COPY which replaces entirely). Removed TB cn:100/150/200 .
conflicts.theirComps: #100 Nature's Beauty Tweak #150 Imprisonment Fix #200 Flesh to Stone Fix
conflicts.source: SR uses COPY for spell files; TB uses COPY_EXISTING/COPY_EXISTING_REGEXP; TB has no SR detection; removed

conflicts.reason: Install order note. ToF IWD spell imports (cn:1500/1510) actively detect SR via MOD_IS_INSTALLED and use different code paths when SR is present (iwd_arcane_spells_postproduction.tpa line 8, iwd_divine_spells_postproduction.tpa line 15). ToF spell tweaks (cn:2000/2060) are built on SFO framework with SR awareness. Only ToF cn:2520 (Revised Elementals, has FORBID_COMPONENT for SR. Install SR before ToF. Keep both — ToF adapts to SR presence.
conflicts.source: ToF iwdspells_arcane.tpa line 35 + iwdspells_divine.tpa line 37: MOD_IS_INSTALLED spell_rev; postproduction files lines 8/15/26/32: conditional SR paths; only cn:2520 FORBIDs SR, 2026-04

conflicts.reason: SnA #720 Update Existing HLAs has REQUIRE_PREDICATE !MOD_IS_INSTALLED SR #65. Both revise warrior HLAs — mutually exclusive. SnA #750 Concentration Check has NO conflict with SR #65 (only forbids Tactics Remix #60).
SR replaces spells entirely. Install SR before NWNForBG so NWN patches the SR versions.
Crucible is not compatible with Spell Revisions. Creature scripts and spell references assume vanilla/SCS spell behavior.
Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 982 vs 297)

sum: Comprehensive overhaul of the spell system, rebalancing and redesigning most arcane and divine spells. Changes how magic works throughout the game.

co.no: Core spell revisions overhaul. Changes 100+ spells to PnP-inspired versions. Major mod — many other mods have SR detection code. INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS (non-fatal): 'no effects added to SPWI801.spl' (Horrid Wilting) — effect structure mismatch, cosmetic.
Fixes Dispel Magic to use proper caster level checks. Recommended even without full SR
Not needed in EE unless main component (#0) is installed.
Interferes with TotLM revenants and trolls, making them unkillable. Install before TotLM's main component to work around.

Replaces NPC spellbook selections with SR-revised equivalents. CONFLICT: Removes MiH Spell Pack spells from NPC books. SR cn:0 already revises spell files globally — without cn:60, NPCs still cast SR-revised spells but keep MiH additions. Do NOT use with MiH Spell Pack .

advisories.reason: Complementary if installed in correct order. SR rewrites spell EFFECTS (what spells do). FnP reassigns spell ACCESS (which classes get which spells via sphere system). FnP does NOT detect SR but operates on different layer (lub_*.2da class tables vs spell .spl files). Install SR first, then FnP — FnP builds its sphere assignments on top of SR-modified spells. FnP's cleric/druid kits (cn:31/33) add new class ability entries that reference spells SR may have changed.
advisories.theirComps: #80 Sphere Systems #31 Cleric Kits #33 Druid Kits
advisories.source: SR modifies SPPR/SPWI .spl files; FnP modifies lub_*.2da/clabpr*.2da for sphere access; different file types, 2026-04

advisories.reason: JTweaks does NOT detect SR. These components use COPY_EXISTING on spell files that SR also modifies. If SR installed first, JTweaks patches SR-modified spells (may produce unexpected hybrid behavior). If JTweaks installed first, SR overwrites JTweaks changes entirely. JTweaks spell fixes are largely redundant with SR — SR's comprehensive rewrite addresses the same issues. Install SR after JTweaks to ensure SR's versions win, or skip JTweaks spell components when using SR.
advisories.theirComps: #40 Enchant Weapon #70 Polymorph immunity #81 #82 #83 Shapeshift #140 True Sight #170 Celestial spells #181 #182 Antimagic #200 Elemental protection #360 Nature's Beauty
advisories.source: JTweaks tp2 has no MOD_IS_INSTALLED spell_rev checks; uses COPY_EXISTING on SPWI415/711 etc, 2026-04

advisories.reason: TR creature scripts assume vanilla/SCS spell behavior. TR tp2 has SPELL_REV variable but it is unused — scripts do not adapt to SR spells. Enemies may use ineffective spell combos. HP multiplier components (#25-30) are unaffected. Not a crash — just suboptimal enemy AI. Install SR before TR.
advisories.theirComps: #8 Kuroisan #10 The Ritual #11 Red Badge #37 Lich in Docks #38 Gnome F/I #8 Improved Sahuagin #65 Improved Irenicus #37 Improved Guarded Compound #12 Improved Twisted Rune #14 Improved Demon Knights #15 Tougher Kangaxx #6 Improved Crypt King #17 Improved Copper Coronet #19 Improved Small Teeth #35 Improved Planar Prison #29 #39 Improved Drizzt #7018 Tougher Fire Giants #7020 Tougher Githyanki #7022 Tougher Yuan-ti
advisories.source: TR tp2 SPELL_REV variable exists but unused in BAF scripts; enemy behavior suboptimal not broken, 2026-04
